description: lotto brings out a flip flop for those who love the contemporary laidback lifestyle. These flip flops features colourful branding on its comfy footbed with heavy duty straps. Wear this with denims rolled up at the hem and bright tees. Upper Rubber and fabric thong style straps with fabric toe separator Textured rubber footbed for instep comfort Outsole TPU outsole with branding and patterned lugs for grip and traction Slipper care Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
